body: review-spec 2026-06-21 APPROVE — carry these findings into implement: (1) MEDIUM treat the 90% bar as FIXED in ac-10; ac-04 confirms the chosen detector clears it, does not re-set it. (2) LOW eval metric grain = exact full-Structure match per fixture (recursive levels all-or-nothing). (3) LOW detection-sampling stays in-process via finetype; do NOT load into DuckDB for detection (keeps choice 0001 clean) — PR reviewer to confirm. (4) LOW duplicate-column/key default policy = rename, for deterministic round-trip column-set checks (ac-11/ac-07).

investigation bypass [ac-01..ac-11]: greenfield repo, no pre-existing dovetail code to investigate. Adjacent-code per tabletop = finetype-core (external lib, API inspected directly) + Frictionless profiles (vendored from frictionlessdata/datapackage). New crates scaffolded fresh.

DEP DECISION (author, 2026-06-21): dovetail-core depends on BOTH finetype-core AND finetype-model (path deps). finetype-model gives model-backed column classification (candle) for the finetype-guided recursive detector — the literal 'profiling' reading of the spec. Accepts candle in dovetail-core (slower builds, larger bin) as the cost. Realises choice 0012.
